formatted.readme:
[b]HevLib[/b]

Library mod used by many mods. If you're seeing this in-game, something probably went wrong :)

[center][b]Abandoned Technologies[/b][/center]

A content mod for [i]∆V: Rings of Saturn[/i]

[center][u]Features[/u][/center]

[indent]
* NPC miners now can utilize all TNTRL variants (except the K44), Cothon variants, Eagle variants, AT-K225 variants (except modified variant), OCP-209, and the Kitsune.

* New ship configs for the dealership, NPC, and derelict ships.

* Added a new container variant: the THI Interlunar Container, rogue form can be found randomly in the rings and be sold by pirates too.

* Experimental Interplanetary containers can be found randomly in the rings, which may contain some loot for capturing them.

* Several variants of the NT Companions, with the mike replaced with other tools, to swapping out the grinders, and even adding in an MPU

* More dialogue options for random crew interactions.

* The Ganymedeans have started to take use of the Eagle Prospectors they've been stockpiling, and using them with the more powerful equipment they have taken from piracy.

* The Ganymedeans now have a chance to sell a ship other than the default 3 (K37, Eagle Prospector, Cothon-212). As a result to the increase in ship opportunities, the weight to be offered an ore container has been increased sevenfold, and the weights for the vanilla 3 ship offers have been increased fourfold each, resulting in a 50.6/49.4 container-to-ship offer ratio.

* You can more rarely find monocargo containers filled with ore, being a much higher risk-reward with higher highs and lower lows. Pirates also occasionally sell these.

* Vilcy utilize their contracts with Obonto Habitats to put their point defence turrets on Titans, and use them in extreme cases of caution.

* You can now ask a container to supply a new one nearby, at a cost of course.

* Empty, inert containers can be found in the rings.

* You can find a new Habitat, SRA-08, under construction in the rings.

* Added a new crew agenda: the Historian

* Questline with the historian unlocks the interplanetary line of cargo container

* Fully configurable from a config with mod menu

[/indent]

[center][b]Industries Of Enceladus Rewrite[/b][/center]

A large content mod for [i]ΔV: Rings of Saturn[/i]

[center][u]Additions:[/u][/center]

[b]18 New Ships:[/b]
[indent]* Tsukuyomi-Class Frigate (Decommissioned)
* OCP-214-DD "Deep Dish"
* OCP-207-SNAP "Piranha"
* SSE Cothon-2200-XL
* MAD-CERF (Civilian Refit)
* UMC Oberon MLP-60
* KX37 TNTRL "RAM"
* Wasp-class Scout (Decommissioned)
* Pigeon Prospector
* Antonoff-Titan K225-SH
* SSE OK720 TNTRL
* Y-ME Fission Retrofit
* OCP-209 Salvaged Hull
* CK-65
* CK-69
* OCP-213 Twin
* OCK Peeper TNTRL
* MAD-CERF (Inverted Civilian Refit)[/indent]

[b]9 New Hardpoint Equipment Items[/b]
[indent]* RA DMW Cannon
* RA DMW Cannon Turret
* NDCL-80 Point Defence Laser Turret
* Rusatom-Antonoff ORD
* Runasimi KRB-500
* TR-60 Extended Manipulator
* OT Hard-Stop Tug Drones
* THI Harvester-class Haul Drones

[b]2 New Mineral Processing Units[/b]
[indent]* Rusatom-Antonoff MPU Mk2
* THI Bulker MPU[/indent]

[b]11 New Thrusters[/b]
Reaction Control System:
[indent]* RMS Pin-C50 thruster
* ERS-BlasTR 7200 thruster
* ND-PNTRm thruster[/indent]

Main Propulsion:
[indent]* RA-TNTRL-R44 quad engine
* RA-K69V quad engine
* ND PMS engine
* SSE NANI Torch Refit
* MA-NTR600-II dual engine
* RMS Pin-M200 engine
* NDDFD engine
* ND ZURBIN engine[/indent]

[b]1 New Autopilot[/b]
[indent]* MA-337-MAX Autopilot[/indent]

[b]10 New Power Systems[/b]
MPDGs:
[indent]* OPG-14 StatPlasma
* MPI City-class MPDG[/indent]

SMESes:
[indent]* OPS-10 Capacitor Bank[/indent]

Ultracapacitors:
[indent]* Light Ultracapacitor
* ND-iSMB
* ND-iSMB Dual Coupling[/indent]

Reactor Cores:
[indent]* 1x SO6 fuel rod[/indent]

Turbines:
[indent]* Thermocouple Array
* Laminar Turbine
* Dual Laminar Turbine[/indent]

[b]2 Propellant Tanks[/b]
[indent]* 2x Freighter propellant tank array
* Frigate propellant tank array[/indent]

[b]2 Mass Driver Ammunition Magazines[/b]
[indent]* Projectile clip
* Shipyard-class projectile magazine[/indent]

[b]1 Nanodrone Component Storage[/b]
[indent]* Shipyard-class nanodrone storage[/indent]

[b]10 Cargo Bay Accessories (New Equipment Type!)[/b]
Preprocessors:
[indent]* Rasamama RP-25
* Nakamura Big MT
* Rusatom-Antonoff MPP-N1
* Rusatom Chunk Cutter
* MAD Heating Coils
* MS Frakker[/indent]

Storage Units:
[indent]* Conlido Internal Storage Rack
* THI Mineral Tank Module[/indent]

Fabrication Units:
[indent]* SSE Voyager Fabricator
* RMS-PAL Fabricator[/indent]

[b]7 New Mineral Hold Kits (New Equipment Type!)[/b]
Storage Units:
[indent]* SSE Saddlebags
* E-Prime Hold Rejoin
* Conlido freightReady Hoppers[/indent]

Variable Geometry Locking Bolts:
[indent]* Locking Bolts[/indent]

Divided to Dynamic Conversion Kits:
[indent]* Conlido aMorphIV
* THI MD-5
* NDSBH[/indent]

[b]17 Consumable Vats (New Equipment Type!)[/b]
Ammunition Storages:
[indent]* MPI Mounted Ammunition Canister
* ND Hollowed Hull Ammunition Magazine
* Antonoff Ammunition Expansion Kit

Nanodrone Component Storages:
[indent]* Runasimi Drone Component Vat

Propellant Storages:
[indent]* Propellant Can Mk. I
* Propellant Can Mk. II

[b]6 Habitat Kits (New Equipment Type!)[/b]

* Runasimi Habitation Capsules

* OCM-36 Upfit[/indent]


[center][u]Changes:[/u][/center]

[b]Ship Changes[/b]
[indent]* OCP-based ships now have 4 variated hardpoints to make them more useful
* Added new slot types: turrets, large drives[/indent]

[b]New Derelicts and NPCs[/b]
[indent]* NPCs for all ships except the Tsukuyomi
* Derelicts for all ships variants with various chances based on their vanilla counterparts (if applicable)
* Can also be purchased from the Pirates[/indent]

[b]Added Ship Parameter Stats[/b]
[indent]* Crew quality and hold capacity displayed at Enceladus
* Hold fill percentage shown on various HUDs[/indent]

[center][b]Velocity Plus[/b][/center]

A large quality of life mod for [i]∆V: Rings of Saturn[/i]

All changes are toggleable and/or tuneable in the mod menu.

[center][u]Current Changes:[/u][/center]

* [b]Show mineral market worth[/b] - displays the total value of your ore in the mineral market.

* [b]Add empty cradle equipment[/b] - Adds empty cradles to side hardpoints.

* [b]MVFS shader style[/b] - Allows the removal or swapping out of the shader used in the Minding Virtual Flight Service.

* [b]Hide portraits[/b] - Allows the crew portraits to be hidden wherever they may be visible outside of the crew menu.

* [b]Fix Voyager RSLS MPU in the OCP-209[/b] - Flips the Voyager MPU in the OCP-209 to make it easier to fill.

* [b]Remove 200 m/s velocity limit[/b] - Removes the velocity limits set by the emergency autopilot.

* [b]Allow travel outside of the ring area[/b] - Lets you exit the normal play area (< 0km and > 3,006km depths).

* [b]Variate broadcasted location timers[/b] - Variates the times provided by other crews and personnel to make them feel more natural to being taken from their astrogation computer. Broadcasts include: locations provided by crew, locations provided by miner crews, SRO broadcasts, pirate container and ship locations.

* [b]Fix gimballed and turreted weapons in place[/b] - Prevents any equipment that can rotate from targeting, locking them to their 0 degree angle.

* [b]Hide undamaged equipment from repairs[/b] - Repair menu will only display equipment below 100%.

* [b]Add tooltips to Enceladus menus[/b] - Adds more tooltips to explain why you can or cannot do something.

* [b]Enable achievements[/b] - allows achievements and leadearboards to be earned with mods enabled.

* [b]Increase crew marker limits[/b] - Increases the number of tracked ores and transponders your crew can manage at once.

* [b]Manipulator arms lock on AP target[/b] - Having an object selected with the autopilot will have the AR-1500M target that above anything else.

* [b]Display negative depth[/b] - The HUD now displays distance from the rings as negative depth rather than blanking out.

* [b]Display dive time[/b] - Shows total dive time in the mechanic tab next to the game's clock.

* [b]Show equipment reliability[/b] - Displays equipment reliability information in the User Manual tab.

* [b]Toggle HUD & MPU[/b] - Adds keybinds to toggle the HUD's display or toggle the MPU's power.

* [b]Pilots reduce astrogation calculation time[/b] - Having a pilot onboard will help reduce the time it takes to calculate an astrogation jump.

* [b]Save stats[/b] - Display the stats of a save, including current money & insurance, and playtime.

* [b]Companion return behaviour[/b] - allow you to choose the default behaviour of companions when they run low on propellant, as well as extend the number of hail options once that happens.

* [b]Disable pilot's automatic adrenaline[/b] - prevent the pilot from activating adrenaline on a dive.

* [b]Auto Repair[/b] - system to calculate and perform the best repair/replace operations, based on multiple selected criteria.

* [b]Transactions[/b] - shows the net transaction amount of all direct bank transactions, alongside a breakdown of a total of all payments to you and purchases you've made.

* [b]Microwaves melt ore[/b] - any microwave system can melt down the water content of ore chunks for a lighter load and a quicker process.

* [b]Toggle ship systems at Enceladus[/b] - allows you to choose what systems are enabled or disabled at the start of a dive within the tuning menu, with additional options to remember toggled systems from the previous dive.

* [b]Maximum astrogator tracking time[/b] - allows you to modify the maximum amount of time your astrogator is able to keep track of POIs.

* [b]Hide crew suits[/b] - allows you to hide the crew's suits whenever visible

* [b]Override turret auto-fire behaviour[/b] - allows you to choose the targeting and auto-fire behaviour of turret-like equipment

* [b]Disable SANBUS on maintenance drones[/b] - allows maintenance drones to ignore other targeting systems

* [b]Temperature-based thrust modifier[/b] - allows for thrusters to have their thrust change based on the current reactor temperature

* [b]Natural time skip[/b] - When opening a save, the time since the save was last opened will be added to the game time, simulating a natural passage of time

[center][b]Moar RADARs[/b][/center]

[b]Cutting-Edge Detection Systems Released by Leading Manufacturers[/b]
[i]From Minding LF, Coherent Light, and Runasimi[/i]
Leading manufacturers continue to push the boundaries of detection technology with the release of the DSR-100 and the upgraded PR-500D, expanding the arsenal of tools available for space exploration and navigation.

[b][u]Minding LF Unveils the BF-220 Beamformed RADAR[/u][/b]
[indent][color=#e67e22][b]“[/b][/color] [color=#a0a0a0][i]Minding LF introduces the [b]BF-220 Beamformed RADAR[/b], a breakthrough in precision scanning. By focusing its low-frequency radio waves into a narrow beam, the BF-220 enhances the detection of distant objects and hidden structures, offering unparalleled accuracy for forward-facing scans. Whether for exploration or threat detection, the BF-220 is ideal for missions requiring high-speed, targeted analysis.[/i][/color][/indent]

[b][u]Conlido RVM Introduces the DSR-100 Doppler Sweeping RADAR[/u][/b]
[indent][color=#e67e22][b]“[/b][/color] [color=#a0a0a0][i]Conlido RVM enters the market with the [b]DSR-100 Doppler Sweeping RADAR[/b], a reliable all-purpose system designed for general navigation. By integrating Doppler-shift detection into a standard sweeping radar, the DSR-100 offers pilots critical velocity data alongside distance measurements. It serves as an excellent upgrade for independent operators looking for enhanced situational awareness without the cost of specialized military hardware.[/i][/color][/indent]

[b][u]Coherent Light Debuts the PR-500 Phased RADAR Array[/u][/b]
[indent][color=#e67e22][b]“[/b][/color] [color=#a0a0a0][i]Coherent Light announces the release of the [b]PR-500 Phased RADAR Array[/b], a next-generation system that eliminates the need for mechanical components. The PR-500 uses phase-shifting technology to direct its RADAR beams electronically, providing near-instantaneous 360-degree scanning. This advanced system excels in detecting and tracking objects in dynamic environments, offering unmatched coverage and response times.[/i][/color][/indent]

[b][u]Coherent Light Upgrades to the PR-500D Doppler Phased RADAR[/u][/b]
[indent][color=#e67e22][b]“[/b][/color] [color=#a0a0a0][i]Building on the success of the PR-500, Coherent Light unveils the [b]PR-500D Doppler Phased RADAR[/b]. This advanced model retains the instantaneous scanning capabilities of the original phased array but adds a high-sensitivity detected frequency shift processor. This enhancement allows for real-time tracking of relative velocities, significantly improving threat assessment capabilities in dynamic environments.[/i][/color][/indent]

[b][u]Runasimi Launches the RLS-900 Hybrid RADAR-LIDAR System[/u][/b]
[indent][color=#e67e22][b]“[/b][/color] [color=#a0a0a0][i]Building on its legacy of high-precision equipment, Runasimi presents the [b]RLS-900 Hybrid RADAR-LIDAR System[/b]. Combining high-resolution LIDAR and low-frequency RADAR, the RLS-900 offers detailed close-range scans while extending detection range through its RADAR capabilities. This hybrid system is perfect for scientific and exploration missions, delivering comprehensive situational awareness in one sophisticated package.[/i][/color][/indent]

These new systems are now available for immediate deployment, bringing advanced detection technologies to the forefront of space exploration and research.

[u][b]Installation Instructions:[/b][/u]
[indent]* Navigate to the game's installation directory (the directory containing "Delta-V.exe")[/indent]
[indent]* Create a new directory called "mods".[/indent]
[indent]* Place the "mod.zip" (ex: MoarRADARs.zip) in the "mods" folder[/indent]
[indent]* Run the game with the "--enable-mods" command-line parameter.[/indent]

[b][u]Compatibility Note:[/u][/b]
[b]Moar RADARs [/b]mod [u]supports[/u] [b][u]ANY[/u][/b] other mod that doesn't modify[b][u] func connectToShip in LIDAR.gd[/u][/b]

[center][b]Ganymede Runners' Aftermarket Huds[/b][/center]

Adds more huds, that's about it really.

[center][b]RGB Lasers[/b][/center]

Makes mining lasers color cycle through the RGB spectrum.
Includes Caramelldansen sound replacement for the firing sound.

A mod that introduces the [b]Adaptive Nanodrone System[/b], allowing to switch between stopping objects (Tug) and retrieving them (Haul) on the fly.

[u][b]Features:[/b][/u]
[indent]* [b]Dynamic Mode Switching[/b]: Toggle between Haul and Tug using your slot activation key.[/indent]
[indent]* [b]Default Mode Tuning[/b]: Set the preferred starting mode for each ship slot via the Tuning menu.[/indent]

[u][b]Configuration:[/b][/u]
[indent]* [b]Cycle Order[/b]:[/indent]
[indent][indent]- [b]Fixed[/b]: Always cycles Haul -> Tug -> Off.[/indent][/indent]
[indent][indent]- [b]Adaptive[/b]: Cycles Default Mode -> Other Mode -> Off.[/indent][/indent]

[b]Mod Menu 2[/b]

Modern mod menu for Delta-V. If you're seeing this in-game, something probably went wrong :)

Adds the ship's variant name or model to the OMS target list.

[u][b]Configuration:[/b][/u]

[b]Display Preference[/b]
[indent]* Sets whether to show the [i]Name[/i] or [i]Model[/i] first. The mod automatically falls back to the other option if the preferred one is not available.[/indent]

[b]Show Non-Hailable[/b]
[indent]* If enabled, the mod will attempt to display names for non-hailable targets, such as derelicts.[/indent]

[b]Show Untranslated Keys[/b]
[indent]* When enabled, displays the raw translation key instead of 'UNKNOWN' if translation is not found.[/indent]

[b]Dynamic Hybrid Naming[/b]
[indent]* If enabled, the Hybrid ship's identity will change frequently.[/indent]

[center][b]Move Xenon Slider[/b][/center]

Moves the Xenon usage slider from the Tuning screen to the Dive Selection screen.

[center][b]Hev's More Minerals[/b][/center]

[center][u]Features:[/u][/center]

[b]New Minerals[/b]
[indent]- 22 new mineral types!

- 20 new Obonto Trades![/indent]

- Mass Geologist filter toggles
[indent]- Press the name of the equipment to turn all toggles on or off in one click.[/indent]

- Multiple minerals per chunk!
[indent]- Enabled in HevLib rather than through this mod.
- Every mineral chunk has a chance to contain more than one type of mineral.
- Less pure mineral chunks will tend to contain more of the other minerals.[/indent]

[center][b]Sandevistan Adrenaline[/b][/center]

Boosts player ship thrusters during adrenal slowdown, allowing normalish movement while time is slowed.

header_data.MOD_NAME: 1 in 10,000 Chance Withered Foxy Jumpscare Every Second
header_data.AUTHOR: __hev

formatted.readme:
[center][b]1 in 10,000 Chance Withered Foxy Jumpscare Every Second[/b][/center]

Adds a small chance for a jumpscare to happen at any point in the game.
Fully configurable with weights and delays in the mod menu!

[center][b]Full Mineral Names[/b][/center]

Converts all instances of a mineral's symbol into their full mineral name.

Used in places like the mineral market, cargo bay and processed mineral displays, and Geologist identification markers.

Also supports minerals added by: [i]Hev's More Minerals[/i]

[center][b]HevLib Language Font Pack 1[/b][/center]

Library extension for HevLib that provides access to a majority of CKJ (Chinese, Korean, Japanese) characters.

[b]Recommended if you are having issues with some characters not appearing correctly in some menus[/b]

Adds a new UwU language option.

[u][b]Configuration:[/b][/u]
[indent]* [b]Enable Dialogue UwU[/b]: Apply UwU transformation to dialogue text.[/indent]
[indent]* [b]Enable UI UwU[/b]: Apply UwU transformation to UI and HUD.[/indent]
[indent]* [b]Enable Tooltips UwU[/b]: Apply UwU transformation to tooltips.[/indent]
[indent]* [b]Enable Equipment UwU[/b]: Apply UwU transformation to equipment names and descriptions.[/indent]
[indent]* [b]Enable Ships UwU[/b]: Apply UwU transformation to ship names and descriptions.[/indent]
[indent]* [b]Enable World UwU[/b]: Apply UwU transformation to lore, oddities, and services.[/indent]
[indent]* [b]Enable Tips UwU[/b]: Apply UwU transformation to loading screen tips.[/indent]
[indent]* [b]Enable Tunes UwU[/b]: Apply UwU transformation to ship tuning descriptions.[/indent]
